attributes.action: Scrap the new changes to the council tax reduction scheme.
attributes.additional_details:
With Wirral council and many other local authorities making a change to the council tax reduction scheme it see's many people who cannot afford to pay council tax and have been helped out for many years, all of a sudden having to pay a minimum of 50%.

Along with the current cost of living crisis this is an incredibly unfortunate situation for thousands of people who have relied on help for a long time. While the council bosses receive higher salaries and waste money on daft projects, we suffer
attributes.background: Make local authorities scrap the new change to the council tax reduction scheme which see's people who are eligible to pay council tax have to pay a minimum 50% regardless of their situation.

rejection.details:
We can only accept petitions about things the Government or Parliament are directly responsible for.

This is a decision that is the responsibility of local councils, not the UK Government or Parliament. While there are regulations on Council Tax Reduction Schemes (https://www.gov.uk/government/publications/localising-support-for-council-tax-guidance-note-on-administrative-matters), each local council makes its own decisions on council tax reduction schemes where they relate to this petition.

You may wish to start a new petition about something else, such as asking the UK Government to require local councils to include certain groups of people, or new discount requirements.
